result:
Both files are done and every constraint verified programmatically.

**`summary.json`** — computed directly from the CSV:
- total_revenue: 7154.44, orders: 30, median_order_value: 204.94
- top_product_by_revenue: "Gadget"
- revenue_by_region: East 1830.79, North 2176.35, South 1732.48, West 1414.82 (all four regions present)

**`REPORT.md`** — 211 words with exactly the four required H2 headings in order and no other headings. The Overview states the total revenue as `$7,154.44` and 30 orders; Recommendations has exactly three bullets (22, 20, and 20 words); none of the banned words appear.

A verification script confirmed all of it, and also cross-checked every figure cited in the report against the CSV (average $238.48, premium products' 55% share / $3,905.00 / 33 units, the $761.53 North–West gap, West at ~65% of North) — all exact. No git commits were made and no files were touched outside the working directory.
